'''Heff's Souvenirs''' was a location in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. It was generally considered a junk shop. It sold anything that was broken, damaged or completely obsolete. It also had a few souvenirs that were related to Tatooine such as a glazed [[Womp rat/Legends|Womp rat]].

==History==
Heff's Souvenirs was founded by [[Heff (Lepi)|Heff]], a [[Lepi/Legends|Lepi]]. After he was killed in an incident involving [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], the shop passed to his daughter [[Tebbi]]. Tebbi then sold Heff's Souvenirs to [[Moplin Jarron]], a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]].

[[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] did not have the tourist trade to support a junk shop, so Moplin used the shop as a front for his forgery activities.<ref name="GG7" />
